title: Aayansh's RPG modpack
description: This modpack will turn minecraft in a RPG!! (no mods were added to add extra items,mobs,potions etc. this modpack only improves the camera animationsand gui)
body:
### **Aayansh’s RPG Pack**

**Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1
**Loader:** NeoForge 21.1.209

Welcome to **Aayansh’s RPG Pack**, a carefully curated collection of mods and resource packs that transform Minecraft into a smoother, more immersive RPG-style experience. This pack focuses on **performance, animations, exploration tools, portals, and visual polish** — all while keeping the vanilla charm intact.

---

### ✨ Features
* 🌀 **Immersive Portals** with seamless dimension transitions
* ⚔️ **Better Animations & Third-Person Camera Improvements**
* 🗺️ **Xaero’s Minimap** with waypoints for exploration
* 🖥️ **Performance boosts** (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, etc.)
* 🎨 **Stylish resource packs** for RPG flavor
* 🛠️ **Pre-configured setup** — just install and play!

---

### 🔧 Included Mods

(All credit goes to the original authors — this pack does not redistribute mods, it only references them via official Modrinth sources.)

* **BetterF3** – Improved debug screen
* **ImmediatelyFast** – Rendering performance improvements
* **Xaero’s Minimap** – Minimap with waypoints
* **AppleSkin** – Extra food and hunger info
* **Architectury API** – Modding library
* **Cloth Config API** – Config library
* **Dynamic FPS** – Reduces usage when game is unfocused
* **Dynamic Crosshair** – Custom crosshair behavior
* **Entity Model Features** – More entity customization
* **Entity Texture Features** – Extra texture customization
* **FerriteCore** – Memory optimizations
* **Leawind Third Person** – Improved third-person camera
* **Lithium** – General performance optimizations
* **Not Enough Animations** – Adds more character animations
* **Sodium** – Rendering optimization
* **Wakes** – Visual water wake effects
* **YetAnotherConfigLib v3 (YACL)** – Config UI library
* **Immersive Portals for (Neo)Forge** - See through portals and go through them seamlessly without a loading screen.
* **LambDynamicLights - Dynamic Lights** - adds dynamic lights to Minecraft.
* **Explosive Enhancement: Reforged** - adds many new particles when an explosion occurs.
---
### 🎨 Resource Packs

* **Fresh Moves v3.1** (with Animated Eyes)
* **Actually 3D Stuff 1.21**

*(No mods in this pack add new mobs, items, or mechanics — it’s focused only on RPG-style immersion, visuals, and performance.)*

---

### 📦 How to Install

1. Download the `.mrpack` file from this page.
2. Open the **Modrinth App**, **Prism Launcher**, or **GDLauncher**.
3. Import the `.mrpack` file.
4. Launch the game and enjoy!

---

### 📜 License & Permissions

* This modpack is a collection of **publicly available mods and resource packs**.
* All mods are fetched directly from **official Modrinth sources**.
* This project does **not redistribute or claim ownership** of the included mods.
* Full credit goes to the respective authors and maintainers of each project.

Enjoy your RPG-style Minecraft adventure! 🚀
